name: zotero-assistant
description: A Zotero 9 in-client assistant plugin with task harness, approvals, audit log, and reversible actions.

scripts.check: node --check bootstrap.js && node --check chrome/content/assistant-constants.js && node --check chrome/content/assistant-i18n.js && node --check chrome/content/assistant-util.js && node --check chrome/content/assistant-styles.js && node --check chrome/content/assistant-tool-dispatch.js && node --check chrome/content/assistant-plugin-ui-dom.js && node --check chrome/content/assistant-plugin-sidebar.js && node --check chrome/content/assistant-plugin-approval-ui.js && node --check chrome/content/assistant-plugin-chat.js && node --check chrome/content/assistant-plugin-model.js && node --check chrome/content/assistant-plugin-task.js && node --check chrome/content/assistant-plugin-prefs.js && node --check chrome/content/assistant-plugin-library.js && node --check chrome/content/assistant-plugin-core.js && node --check chrome/content/zotero-assistant.js && node --check scripts/build-xpi.mjs && python3 -c "import ast, pathlib; ast.parse(pathlib.Path('scripts/build_xpi.py').read_text(encoding='utf-8'))"
